title: AXHierarchyChartOption
description: Configuration options for the hierarchy chart component including layout, styling, animations, and interactive features

types.title: AXHierarchyChartOption
types.description: Configuration options for the hierarchy chart

props.name: width
props.description: Fixed width for the chart (px). If not provided, container width is used

props.name: height
props.description: Fixed height for the chart (px). If not provided, container height is used

props.name: nodeRadius
props.description: Node radius in pixels (used when no custom node template is provided)

props.name: nodeStrokeWidth
props.description: Node stroke width (used when no custom node template is provided)

props.name: linkStyle
props.description: Style of the links between nodes: 'straight' (Direct straight lines), 'curved' (Default curved lines), 'rounded' (Curved lines with rounded corners), 'step' (L-shaped stepped lines)

props.name: showTooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltips on hover

props.name: direction
props.description: Direction of the hierarchy chart layout: 'vertical' (top-to-bottom flow), 'horizontal' (left-to-right flow)

props.name: nodeWidth
props.description: Fixed node dimensions when using custom node templates

props.name: nodeHeight
props.description: Fixed node dimensions when using custom node templates

props.name: expandAll
props.description: Whether to initially expand all nodes

props.name: className
props.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the chart container

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration of the animation in milliseconds

props.name: animationEasing
props.description: Type of easing function to use for animations

inherited.name: nativeElement
inherited.description: The root native element. Inherited from NXComponent

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: Canonical interface definition from source code
